description: A customer needs to cancel an order that has been placed but has not yet entered production.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent retrieves the correct sales order.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the linked work order has not yet started.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent checks the work order status and confirms it is still 'Scheduled', not 'In Progress'.

nodes.task_description: Cancel the sales order and the associated work order.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully cancels both records in the system and informs the customer.
